title: Restore canonical launcher topology and resync runtime/API state to DB truth
objective: Process/state stabilization only. Restore one clean canonical launcher/process topology, verify exactly one valid instance of each critical service, make runtime/API state converge to DB truth, and observe a short stability window. No production code changes unless absolutely necessary.
constraints: no production code changes unless absolutely necessary
BOT_BRIDGE files are the only normal write target unless forced into BLOCKED
verification_targets: DB open rows count matches /api/state open positions count
DB open rows count matches /api/trades open count if available
no new duplicate opens appear in short observation window
